description_long: This chair features a distinctive egg-shaped shell with a dark, wood-like exterior and a plush, upholstered interior in a muted red fabric. The seat and backrest are deeply cushioned, forming an inviting oval nest that envelops the sitter. The upholstery has a subtle woven or quilted pattern, adding visual interest and texture. Three slender, tapered legs with brass-colored tips support the chair, giving it a mid-century modern aesthetic. The high, rounded backrest curves seamlessly into the armrest area, providing both comfort and privacy. Its unique form and materials make it suitable for stylish urban interiors such as lounges, lobbies, or upscale waiting areas.
description: An egg-shaped chair with a dark wooden shell and plush red upholstered interior, supported by three tapered legs. The design is modern, cozy, and visually striking.
description_view_0: Rear view showing the smooth, dark wooden shell and the three splayed legs.
description_view_1: Angled side view highlighting the thick, red upholstered rim and the chair's deep, enveloping shape.
description_view_2: Front view displaying the oval, cushioned seat and backrest with a visible patterned fabric.
description_view_3: Opposite angled side view, again showing the plush rim and the curvature of the shell.
